queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT country) AS country_count,
  COUNT(*) AS total_users
FROM users

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  latitude AS lat,
  longitude AS long,
  country,
  gender
FROM users
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND longitude IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 2000
queries.inputQueryString:

  latitude AS lat,
  longitude AS long,
  country,
  gender
FROM users
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND longitude IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 2000

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  country,
  AVG(latitude) AS lat,
  AVG(longitude) AS long,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM users
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND longitude IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY user_count DESC
LIMIT 50
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  country,
  AVG(latitude) AS lat,
  AVG(longitude) AS long,
  COUNT(*) AS user_count
FROM users
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
  AND longitude IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY user_count DESC
LIMIT 50

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS revenue
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  LEFT(CAST(created_at AS VARCHAR), 7) AS month,
  ROUND(SUM(sale_price), 2) AS revenue
FROM order_items
WHERE status NOT IN ('Cancelled', 'Returned')
GROUP BY month
ORDER BY month

queries.compiledQueryString:
SELECT
  country,
  COUNT(*) AS users,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct_of_users
FROM users
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY users DESC
LIMIT 15
queries.inputQueryString:
SELECT
  country,
  COUNT(*) AS users,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct_of_users
FROM users
GROUP BY country
ORDER BY users DESC
LIMIT 15
